reasoning: The ON RRP facility has been structurally draining over 2024–2025 due to Quantitative Tightening. As of early November 2025, it has reached near-zero levels, specifically sitting at 4.903 billion on November 7 (the likely baseline or very close to it). Multiple news reports confirm the facility is effectively 'exhausted' or 'near-zero' (search_0), meaning large structural balances are gone. This leaves only a 'noise floor' of roughly $0 to $10 billion on non-month-end days. During mid-October, the daily average was around 4.6 billion. Since 4.9 billion is above both the recent median and the ongoing downward trendline, the immediate near-term likelihood for November 16 (using mid-month Friday data) is tipped toward a decrease. As we go further out to December (Dec 9) and February (Feb 7), the inherent noise of daily fluctuations in this lower bound, combined with uncertainty over exactly when the Fed will halt QT (which would stabilize reserves), increases the variance, pushing the probabilities steadily closer to a coin toss (0.50).
